presets.name: Minimal
presets.description: Only removals nobody misses: sponsored content, preinstalled promos, and telemetry. Fully serviceable, no behaviour changes.

presets.name: Balanced
presets.description: The everyday debloat. Removes Microsoft's bundled apps, Copilot, OneDrive and Edge while leaving Windows Update, Defender and the component store intact.

presets.name: Aggressive
presets.description: Balanced plus optional features, legacy components and search indexing. Still serviceable, but assumes you know what you no longer need.

presets.name: Core (unserviceable)
presets.description: Strips servicing itself: WinSxS, Windows Update, WinRE and Defender. The smallest possible image, and it can never be updated, repaired or have features added. For disposable test and lab VMs only.
